items.title: Lead Technical Writer
items.text: Work experience — 11 years 2 months

items.title: MTS, Innovations
items.text:
Information technology, system integration, Internet March 2024 — present time, 1 year

Lead Technical Writer

  • Manage the internal product knowledge base in Confluence.
  • Write and publish product Release Notes.
  • Coordinate external resources for documentation development.
  • Contribute to the development of a tool using LLM and GraphRAG.

items.title: Group-IB
items.text:
Information Security June 2022 — February 2024, 1 year 9 months

Technical Communications Team Lead

  • Implemented an open-source tool to replace a complex in-house solution.
  • Managed tasks from four different sources, including JIRA and GitLab.
  • Introduced the RASCI responsibility assignment approach.
  • Improved the efficiency of the technical communications team.
  • Introduced the Diataxis approach to documentation.

items.title: VKontakte
items.text:
Digital Services December 2018 – May 2022 (3 years 6 months)

Senior Technical Writer

  • Implemented Swagger for internal API documentation.
  • Documented key features of the classified service VK Ads.
  • Developed a style guide for project documentation.
  • Managed the team's knowledge base in Confluence.
  • Configured automatic documentation site updates using Jenkins.

items.title: FORS
items.text:
Digital solutions integrator February 2016 – November 2018 (2 years 10 months)

Senior Engineer

  • Implemented Oracle Identity Management in two banks.
  • Authored technical documentation, including manuals, guides, and supporting documents.
  • Developed an access management role model for multiple bank departments.
  • Created presentations and conducted training for bank employees on Oracle IDM.
  • Developed system connectors using Java.

items.title: Citibank
items.text:
Banking Sector July 2012 – June 2014 (2 years)

Operational Control, Information Security, and Suspicious Activity Monitoring Specialist

  • Analyzed bank information systems for information security policy violations.
  • Established collaboration with the Kazakhstan branch during regional reporting audits.
  • Developed an Excel tracker to monitor employee compliance checks.
  • Tested system migration to the unified information platform Rainbow.

items.title: Headers
items.text:
# H1 Header
## H2 Header
### H3 Header
#### H4 Header
##### H5 Header
###### H6 Header

items.title: Text formatting
items.text:
**bold text**
*italic text*
***bold and italic***
~~strikethrough~~
`inline code`

items.title: Links and images
items.text:
[Link text](https://example.com)
[Link with title](https://example.com "Hover title")
![Alt text](image.jpg)
![Image with title](image.jpg "Image title")

items.title: Lists
items.text:
Unordered:

- Item 1
- Item 2
  - Nested item

Ordered:

1. First item
2. Second item
3. Third item

items.title: Blockquotes
items.text:
> This is a blockquote
> Multiple lines
>> Nested quote

items.title: Code blocks
items.text:
```javascript
function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, world!");
}
```

items.title: Tables
items.text:
| Header 1 | Header 2 | Header 3 |
|----------|----------|----------|
| Row 1    | Data     | Data     |
| Row 2    | Data     | Data     |

items.title: Horizontal rule
items.text:
---
or
***
or
___

items.title: Task lists
items.text:
- [x] Completed task
- [ ] Incomplete task
- [ ] Another task

items.title: Escaping characters
items.text: Use backslash to escape: \* \_ \# \`

items.title: Line breaks
items.text:
End a line with two spaces  
to create a line break.

Or use a blank line for a new paragraph.
